title: A Map fom my Future
description: One of my favorite memories. Fifteen minutes at the welcome center slash admissions office, a map, and proof that kindness is truly beautiful.

title: Paper Planes
description: My gold-medal flash fiction piece that immortalized an embarrassing typo. It was the peak of my writing career, but how did I let that fly by?

title: Barker Sailing
description: I was super excited for sailing at CPW so I painted Barker in a dinghy!

title: Barker's art class
description: Barker loved modeling at the mini canvas painting at CPW! My classmates did an amazing job capturing his physique.

title: Deluluversity Renovations Part 1: Update Automations
description: I added a script to automate website updates which was pretty good Python practice. Instead of writing and copying HTML format, I edit a JSON and the Python script translates that into HTML format and updates the pages.
